commit_scope: Guide sibling worktree continuity by recognizing squash-merged patch-equivalent work as integrated, while preserving dirty siblings as living guidance.

notes: Patch-equivalent squash-merged worktrees are reported as integrated_patch_equivalent guidance, not blocking stranded work.
Dirty sibling worktrees remain visible as integration candidates so their nutrients are not abandoned.

deploy_validation.notes: No runtime endpoint behavior changed by the continuity guide; public deploy verification remains part of merge flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local focused proof passes; PR/CI/deploy pending.

evidence_refs: continuity guide: blocking_risk_count=0 with integrated_patch_equivalent siblings visible as guidance
prompt guide: passed after continuity guide repair

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Sibling worktrees whose patches already reached main through squash merges no longer block prompt entry as stranded work, while dirty siblings remain visible for integration.
test_flows: Unit test for patch-equivalent ahead worktree guidance
